description: Plugin-distributed hooks for engineering-management. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: review this Engineering Management deliverable against the §3 house opinions (a claim about a person is a hypothesis not a verdict, no velocity-ranked individuals, source+date on every benchmark, no personnel PII). Set ENGINEERING_MANAGEMENT_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
